zh.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene是Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench和Amabel的女兒，於1341年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾布頓。她於1351年與William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1391年12月2日在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene是Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench和Amabel的女儿，于1341年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾布頓。她于1351年与William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1391年12月2日在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯享年50岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾哈利沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Green
meanings: English: either a nickname for someone who was fond of dressing in this color (Old English grēne) or was young or immature, or who had played the part of the ‘Green Man’ in the May Day celebrations, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a village green (Middle English grene, a transferred use of the color term). This is one of the most common and widespread of English surnames. In North America it has assimilated cognates from other languages, notably German Grün (see Gruen ) and Dutch Groen ; compare 7 below. This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: alternatively, from a Middle English personal name Grene.
Irish: adopted for Ó hUainín ‘descendant of Uainín’, a personal name from a pet form of uaine ‘green’, see Honan .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene was born in 1341, in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England as the daughter of Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench and Amabel. She married William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche in 1351, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 2 December 1391, in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 50, and was buried in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene est née en 1341, à Boughton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, fille de Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench et Amabel. Elle a épousé William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche en 1351, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 2 décembre 1391, à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterrée à Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene wurde 1341 in Boughton, Northamptonshire, England, als Tochter von Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench und Amabel geboren. Sie hat 1351 in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. Dezember 1391 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene è nata il nel 1341 nel Boughton, Northamptonshire, England come figlia di Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench e Amabel. Lei sposato William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche nel 1351, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 dicembre 1391, nel Harringworth, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolta a Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Greneは1341年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアボウトンでSir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's BenchとAmabelの娘として生まれた。1351年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスでWilliam la Zouche 3rd Baron Zoucheと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1391年12月2日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスで50歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアハーリングウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene(은)는 1341년 영국 노르섬프토실르 부그h턴에서 Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench(와)과 Amabel의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1351년 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1391년 12월 2일 영국 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 해링워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene nasceu em 1341, em Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra filha de Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench e Amabel. Ela casou-se com William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche em 1351, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 2 de dezembro de 1391, em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 50 anos, e foi sepultada em Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene родилась в 1341 г. в местности боугтон, нортамптоншир, Англия. Её родителей звали Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench и Amabel. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche в 1351 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла 2 декабря 1391 г. в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 50 лет и была похоронена в местности харрингворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes de Grene nació en 1341, en Boughton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra como hija de Sir Henry de Grene Chief Justice of the King's Bench y Amabel. Se casó con William la Zouche 3rd Baron Zouche en 1351, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de diciembre de 1391, en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultada en Harringworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
